Tamil Thalaivas Sack Coach Sanjeev Baliyan After PKL 12

Nov 13, 2025 • 8JJ Sports

Tamil Thalaivas Sack Coach Sanjeev Baliyan After PKL 12

After a disappointing PKL Season 12, the Tamil Thalaivas have sacked head coach Sanjeev Baliyan, signaling a major restructuring ahead of the next season.
